meaning: n.软木塞,软木,(用塞子)塞住
examples: He drew the cork out of the bottle.
He was pulling the cork from a bottle of wine.
I like the pop you get when you pull out a cork.
Mark Farren and Nash had further chances before Cork skipper Murray inadvertently broke the deadlock.
In one recent Dail debate Cork Sinn Fein TD Jonathan O'Brien said his party was pro-life.
